why: Produced by the best creative agency in Saudi — the craft ceiling for Saudi F&B social. Mark gold on EVERY dimension, but as an ASPIRATION/CRAFT reference: it sets the bar; the producer still renders that bar through each client's executable reality (phone, budget, face/format rules). Gold pulls direction; client organs keep it executable.

coverage.note: IG paginated to 288 (HTTP 400 ceiling) — ~11mo, effectively last-year; not re-pushed to protect the session.

gold_per_dimension.campaign_craft: THE headline lesson + a unit we never modeled: connected posts forming arcs. See campaigns.json — #كوب_تسمع_فيه ran 13 posts/10 days; occasion campaigns (#اليوم_الوطني National Day) hit the highest engagement (~1500 avg likes vs ~600 baseline). The brand keeps an always-on tagline (#وقته_كل_الوقت) under which campaigns rotate.
gold_per_dimension.caption_craft: candidate — decompose voice/length/hook from the 288 captions (next).
gold_per_dimension.visual_craft: candidate — vision-decompose the 373 media (palette/composition/hook frames) like the pilots.
gold_per_dimension.cadence: candidate — ~1.18 posts/day; campaign bursts cluster tightly (6-10 day arcs).

status: marked. WIRING PENDING — the brain does not yet read this gold (the reader is the next step; a gold mark with no consumer is a Rule #6 write-only-organ). Aspiration-craft tag means it lifts the bar, never sets an SME-unreachable copy-target.
